name: Andrea McFadden
text: When signing in with a non-Housecall Pro account, there's no clear "access denied" message — I expected to be told I couldn't get in, but there's no option to log in outside of Okta. (Severity: Low)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: Name/role/team are pre-populated correctly from my HCP record during profile setup, but I'm unable to edit them. The data was correct for me, but this could be a problem if someone's prefilled data is wrong. (Severity: Med)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: During goal selection, once I entered my selected goals I was routed into the app — and afterward I couldn't get back to the goal selection screen.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: On the goals display, the goals show listed with commas instead of as a formatted list (a, b, c, etc.).

name: Andrea McFadden
text: The streak and XP pills on Home aren't clickable — I expected tapping them to navigate back to Home.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: I have a partially completed lesson, but it doesn't show up in the notification bell dropdown. (Severity: Med)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: Question on intended behavior: should I be able to complete lessons without finishing the "Your Move" section? I was able to submit lessons by only answering the review question.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: Pause & resume: the paused lesson didn't show in the notification bell — it showed further down the screen with a Resume button. When I resumed a narrated lesson the narration had to regenerate (took a while), and resuming brought me back to the beginning instead of where I left off.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: Inside a lesson there's no option to refine or regenerate to make it simpler or more specific — I couldn't find the refine/regenerate control.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: Project Quest worked once I clicked the Project Quest tile, but the difference between Deep Dive and Project Quest isn't very obvious. (Severity: Low)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: In Just Chat, the footer is supposed to link to both the HCP Skill Shop Help and HCP MX Skill Shop help channels — I don't see either one.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: I don't see the "open tool / LLM window" callout for my preferred tool from within lessons at all — only from My AI Tools under my name in the top right. There's also no guidance on how to use it; it just opens the tool. (Severity: Med)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: The only way to change your preferred tool is to remove it and let the others move to the top. It would be nice to have a button or drag-and-drop to order your tools. Also, when I changed the order there was a link to my preferred tool at the bottom.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: On My Role, after changing my department/sub-team (and when trying "Schedule a date"), I'm unable to click "Apply now" to save the change.

name: Andrea McFadden
text: The guided tour launched from Settings isn't interactive the way it is the first time after calibration — it opens as a plain-text box, the Next button sometimes works and sometimes doesn't, and I can exit but can't complete the tour. Not a severe break, but should be fixed for learners. (Severity: Med)

name: Andrea McFadden
text: First impression: 4/5 — really excellent. I noted a few places where I couldn't find things, but overall I think this is going to be a game changer.
